channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Utah HC erases two-goal deficit to stun Vancouver
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Mikhail Sergachev scored with 12 seconds left in overtime, as the Utah Hockey Club stormed back from a 2-0 deficit in the third period to beat the Vanouver Canucks and end a five-game home losing streak, 3-2.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: White Sox announce list of players to attend SoxFest 2025
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have announced a list of seven players and eight prospects who will join fans at SoxFest 2025, which is making its return after a four-year hiatus, featuring new fan experiences and a "State of the White Sox" address with Manager Will Venable and front office leadership.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Girls Soccer: Our Lady of Peace 6, Patrick Henry 3
item.description: Holiday Jubilee tournament in girls soccer OLP facing off against Patrick Henry. OLP took home the 6-3 victory.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: NBA unveils new All-Star format featuring four-team tournament
item.description: The NBA 's All-Star Game is going to be an All-Star tournament this season, with the league announcing on Tuesday that it has finalized plans to use a different format for the upcoming midseason showcase in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: LAFC, LA Galaxy to join 18 other pro soccer teams for preseason event in Southern California
item.description: Both of L.A.’s professional men’s soccer clubs will join 18 other teams – including six women’s teams – for the 2025 Coachella Valley Invitational. Preseason matches at the Empire Polo Club in Indio begin on Feb.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5
